extDescription.message: Passman Premium — the password manager for Nextcloud / ownCloud

search_for.description: No credentials found for the current site

no_credentials_found_for_site.message: No credentials found for this site.
no_credentials_found_for_site.description: No credentials found for the current site

no_credentials_found.description: No credentials found for the current site

notes.description: No credentials found for the current site

invalid_response_from_server.message: The server responded with an error: $STATUS_CODE$ $STATUS_TEXT$
invalid_response_from_server.description: No credentials found for the current site

add_hint.message: After saving, you can edit this credential in Passman Premium.
add_hint.description: After creating it, you can edit the credential in Passman

browser_action_title_locked.description: Browser extension title when the extension is locked

http_warning.message: This server uses HTTP — your login will be sent unencrypted. Your Passman credentials themselves stay encrypted.

https_unreachable.message: Could not reach this server over HTTPS. Check the address, or continue over unencrypted HTTP:
https_unreachable.description: Shown when the HTTPS reachability check fails during setup

use_http_anyway.description: Action to explicitly continue with an unencrypted server URL

enable_autosubmit.message: Submit the form after filling a credential

enable_update_url.message: Offer to update a credential's URL when it changes

ignore_site_placeholder.message: Type a domain to ignore and press Enter

enable_password_picker.message: Show the password picker in login fields

password_picker_gotolist.message: Open the picker on the list tab when credentials are found

intro_text.message: This wizard will guide you through the steps to set up the extension and keep all your passwords synchronized.

default_vault_desc.message: Select the vault to keep in sync with this browser.
default_vault_desc.description: Select the vault that you want to keep in sync with the webbrowser.

enter_master_password_desc.message: This password encrypts everything the extension stores on this device. If you choose to remember it, it is stored encrypted so the extension can unlock automatically.

master_pw_warning.message: The master password is stored encrypted on this device so the extension can unlock automatically. Anyone with full access to this browser profile could still recover it.

disable_picker_text.message: Disable Passman Premium on this page only, or on the entire site?
disable_picker_text.description: Would you like to disable Passman for the current page, or for the entire website?

empty_master_key.message: The master password cannot be empty.

master_key_too_short.message: The master password must be at least 8 characters long.
master_key_too_short.description: Master password below the minimum length

credential_damaged.message: This credential could not be fully decrypted — the stored data is damaged. To protect the record it cannot be edited; delete it and create a new one.
credential_damaged.description: Shown when saving a credential whose fields failed to decrypt

extra_accounts.message: After the setup process is complete, you can add more accounts.

select_password_picker_default_tab.message: When the password picker finds no credentials, open this tab:

no_vaults.message: No vaults found. Create a vault in the Passman app on your Nextcloud server, then try again.

msg_reset_extension.message: Your master password cannot be reset. What you can do is reset the extension back to its default state and set it up again. Your vaults on the Nextcloud server are not affected.

edit_insufficient_permissions.message: You don't have permission to edit this credential.
edit_insufficient_permissions.description: You don't have permissions to edit this credential.

invalid_server_settings.message: Please fill in the server URL, username and password.

extension_locked.message: Enter your master password to unlock.
extension_locked.description: When the extension is locked, and requires an unlock to use it

invalid_master_password.description: When the master password is invalid

save_to.description: Amount of the credentials found for the current site

saving_to.description: Amount of the credentials found for the current site

auto_login.message: Passman Premium is signing you in as $USERNAME$
auto_login.description: Amount of the credentials in the database

text.description: To describe a textual input field

theme.description: Label for the theme preference section

theme_system.description: Follow the operating system color scheme

about.description: Label for the About section in settings

no_custom_fields.description: Shown in the credential editor when a credential has no custom fields

credentials_loaded.description: Popup header subtitle showing how many credentials are loaded

setup_complete.message: Everything is configured and ready to use. Open Passman Premium from the toolbar to browse your credentials — matching logins are suggested on every site, and new logins can be saved as you browse.
setup_complete.description: Shown under the Done! heading on the last setup step

generate.description: Password picker tab name in the default-tab select

connection_timeout_error.message: Could not reach the server — the connection timed out.
connection_timeout_error.description: Notification when the Nextcloud server does not answer in time

connection_error.description: Notification for a failed server connection

credentials_refreshed.description: Header status flash after a manual refresh completes

open_password_picker.description: Aria label for the in-field button that opens the password picker
